text: Welding and metal fabrication is a high-demand trade serving Uganda's construction boom. Products: burglar-proof window grills, gates, door frames, beds, shelves, charcoal stoves. Startup: welding machine (UGX 350,000-800,000), grinding machine (UGX 150,000-300,000), safety gear — goggles, gloves, apron (UGX 80,000), initial steel stock — flat bars, round bars, angle iron (UGX 300,000-500,000), workspace with power access (UGX 100,000-200,000/month). Total: UGX 1,000,000-2,000,000. Revenue: simple window grill UGX 80,000-150,000 (materials UGX 30,000-50,000), gate UGX 300,000-800,000. Monthly income: UGX 800,000-3,000,000 for busy workshop.
